inputs.reasoning: Many alternations inside a Kleene star forces repeated pushes onto the job stack, potentially triggering GrowStack and exercising kInstAlt with arg==0 and arg==1
Deeply nested repetitions of alternations create massive job stack pressure, likely triggering GrowStack
Multiple alternations with captures exercise kInstAlt switch cases and kInstCapture
Optional alternations create kInstAltMatch instructions, exercising greedy/non-greedy paths
Deeply nested captures with alternations push many jobs and exercise ShouldVisit checks
Non-greedy quantifiers generate kInstAltMatch with non-greedy path, exercising the out-is-match branch
Many capture groups exercise kInstCapture repeatedly, pushing save/restore jobs onto the stack
Character class alternations exercise kInstByteRange and kInstAlt with multiple branches
Alternations of different-length strings inside repetition create many revisit opportunities, exercising ShouldVisit false branch
Many paired alternations inside a group with repetition exercises the main TrySearch loop and kInstAlt opcode dispatch
